about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a Mexican Software Development Engineer specialized in high-performance Web and AI solutions. With a US Tourist/Business visa and a Mexican passport, I am ready to relocate and bring my expertise globally.

vecode.name: Vecode — Port and Industrial Operations Platform
vecode.subtitle: Architecting a Scalable Solution
vecode.legacyDesc: Re-architected an unmaintainable legacy PHP system into a modern, scalable full-stack enterprise application resolving deep technical debt.
achievements: Modern Full-Stack Architecture from Scratch: Developed Backend with Laravel 11 (PHP 8.2), Spatie, queues, and GitHub Actions CI/CD for zero-downtime deployment.
Frontend with React 18 & TypeScript: Built a fast SPA using Inertia.js avoiding a separate REST API, implementing Headless UI and Framer Motion for premium UX.
Complex Domain Modeling: Engineered physical port logistics pipelines—from vessel management (ECO/WHISKY) and scale workflows, to atomic lightering (Burreo) operations.
Crucial Architecture Pivot: Cleanly isolated commercial data (Shipment Orders) from operational data (Loading Orders), decoupling systems and resolving historical folio conflicts.
Dock Collision Validation & Mathematical Hold Squaring: Programmed preventive algorithms to avoid logistical dock bottlenecks and to ensure tonnage precision.
Interactive Drill-Down Dashboard: Constructed real-time analytics with multi-level drill-down capabilities for robust operational visibility.
Database Architecture: Modeled an 88-migration relational schema in MySQL complete with historical traceability, indices optimization, and a 'Shadow Folio' persistence strategy.
vecode.impact: Eliminated manual scaling errors, ensured end-to-end truck lifecycle traceability, locked downstream commercial data logically, and delivered real-time analytics for senior management.
